title: Newlife Point
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Newlife Point''' was [[Carosi XII]]'s [[Capital/Legends|capital]] and only [[City/Legends|city]]. Its northwestern sector contained the planet's [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]], major [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]], asylums, and [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetics]] facilities. The [[Carosite]]'s disdain for [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]] resulted in Newlife Point's small number of bars; where alcohol was available, but it was heavily taxed. Offworlders also found the Carosite tendency to dispense dietary advice annoying. [[Restaurant/Legends|Restaurant]] staff in Newlife Point were known for their catchphrase, "Eat right and live right."

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' {{C|Weather report list only}}
